title: Victorias Secret Fashion Show Ayanamis Plug Suit
display_title: Victorias Secret Fashion Show Ayanamis Plug Suit
wikitext:
[]: Victoria's Secret Fashion Show - Ayanami's Plug Suit!             Quote Post by harunokaze » Tue Dec 04, 2012 11:18 pm So I just watched the VS Fashion Show and this model is wearing Ayanami's plug suit... holy cow...

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Tue Dec 04, 2012 11:26 pm They're Gangnam Style-ing in the background, aren't they?

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Tue Dec 04, 2012 11:30 pm This was discussed quite a bit around the forum right after the fashion show happened. Apparently neither Gainax nor Khara was notified about this outfit until after the fact. I'm not sure what became of it, though. @Chuckman They sure look like it....

[]:             Quote Post by Redtophat » Tue Dec 04, 2012 11:33 pm This is Gross.

[]:             Quote Post by harunokaze » Tue Dec 04, 2012 11:34 pm I've been lurking since 3.0 came out (at least once a day <_<_>) but hadn't come across this until I was watching the show and nearly choked on my drink! I googled it and saw on Tumblr that someone was saying it was an "homage" to Evangelion, but if no one from Gainax or Khara was consulted... what will happen now that thousands of ppl around the world have watched the show?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Dec 05, 2012 12:02 am Dude (or dudette), I was trying to forget this thing, y'know.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Dec 05, 2012 12:03 am Was there another VS Fashion show featuring this same outfit earlier in the year? My Facebook wall is getting a lot of posts about one happening now, but I could've sworn we've seen that same model and plugsuit ripoff before....

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Dec 05, 2012 12:04 am First time was around here: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/569978/Evangelion-Pictures-Thread-2-Post-all-images-in-spoilers/#569978

[]:             Quote Post by harunokaze » Wed Dec 05, 2012 12:08 am Ornette - that was the initial taping of the show, and it aired TONIGHT on national tv. prob world wide. (the other costumes were amazing though) I'm wondering though, besides the fact that VS claims all their costumes are new and original and they spend hours upon hours designing them and creating them, could they get away with such an obvious copy of something original in its own right. VS is only like the biggest name in lingerie worldwide...

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Dec 05, 2012 5:01 am The trick is to find the old thread, not start a new one.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Dec 05, 2012 5:33 am Jayfive wrote: The trick is to find the old thread, not start a new one.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Wed Dec 05, 2012 7:57 am Nice looking gal but the outfit is atrocious! It's only fit for Ayanami.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Wed Dec 05, 2012 8:25 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Well, there was no thread about this abomination, so I think that harunokaze really didn't make any mistake in creating a new one, besides reminding me again of this thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Lurkis » Wed Dec 05, 2012 9:15 pm It cannot be unseen D: I am sure if Gainax was a part of this, it would look half decent.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Wed Dec 05, 2012 9:29 pm Looking at it again, nope, still the same reaction kimochi warui

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Dec 05, 2012 9:44 pm Fireball wrote: kimochi warui

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI_01 » Thu Dec 06, 2012 12:37 am That's so horrible.... now i wish I never even saw that...

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Thu Dec 06, 2012 9:59 am At least it wasn't the test plug suit, which would have been horrible no matter what you thought of Shikinami's donning of it in 2.22. It's also weird because you'd think the test suit would have been a more natural target for a Victoria's Secret show...

[]:             Quote Post by Rj123541 » Thu Dec 06, 2012 10:14 am Another thing to add to my don't likes. Why couldn't they just stick to nightwear and crappy bathing suits?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Dec 06, 2012 11:36 am Rei IV wrote: Nice looking gal but the outfit is atrocious! It's only fit for Ayanami.
